title: AIIMS Delhi Multipurpose Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: All India Institute of Medical Sciences All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi
shortInfo: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Multipurpose Staff (Project Technical Support-1) Notification 2026 has been released on 02 May 2026 on the official website aiims.edu. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Multipurpose Staff (Project Technical Support-1) Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Multipurpose Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Multipurpose Staff (Project Technical Support-1) Notification 2026 has been released on 02 May 2026 on the official website aiims.edu. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Multipurpose Staff (Project Technical Support-1) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: Relaxation as per rules of AIIMS

qualification.education_qualification: Three Years Graduate degree in relevant subject / field + one year experience in relevant subject
qualification.details: Three Years Graduate degree in relevant subject / field + one year experience in relevant subject

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Multipurpose Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Multipurpose Staff (Project Technical Support-1) position at AIIMS Delhi is 30th May 2026. Ensure you complete the process before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Three Years Graduate degree in a relevant subject or field, along with at least one year of experience in the relevant subject to be eligible for this role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Multipurpose Staff position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 30 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the rules and regulations of AIIMS.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Multipurpose Staff post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the Multipurpose Staff (Project Technical Support-1) position in this recruitment drive by AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Multipurpose Staff role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Multipurpose Staff (Project Technical Support-1) position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 18,000.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the notification, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the AIIMS Delhi Multipurpose Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a contract-based position, meaning the job is on a contractual basis for a specified period.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It contains all detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the AIIMS Delhi Multipurpose Staff position?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official website of AIIMS Delhi or by using the direct "Apply Online" link provided in the "Important Links" section before the last date of application.
